coach.title: Fitz Coach
coach.welcome: Hallo! Ich bin Fitz, dein KI-Ernährungscoach. Wie kann ich dir heute helfen?

nutritionist.welcome: Hello! I am Fitz, your AI nutritionist. How can I help you with your diet today?
nutritionist.suggest2: Give me a high-protein breakfast idea 🍳
nutritionist.suggest3: How can I reduce sugar cravings? 🍬

trainer.welcome: Hi! I am Fitz, your AI personal trainer. What are we working on today?
trainer.suggest3: I have knee pain, what leg exercises can I do? 🦵
